name: Kindergarten Music — Semester 1
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for steady beat, singing voice, loud/soft, and listening. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with steady beat, singing voice, loud/soft, and listening.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.
